name: DILI - Medication Query (Methotrexate as offending drug)
description: Tests ability to find DILI patients via the offending drug. Methotrexate is one of many documented hepatotoxins. This is a TRICKY query because most methotrexate users (RA, psoriasis, malignancy) do NOT develop DILI — the meds-only path catches an at-risk pool much larger than the actual DILI cohort. Real PheKB algorithm specifies institution-specific drug lists; we use methotrexate as a representative hepatotoxin.
prompt: Find patients prescribed methotrexate, a known hepatotoxin used in rheumatoid arthritis and psoriasis.

prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed methotrexate — a documented hepatotoxin used for rheumatoid arthritis, psoriasis, and other inflammatory conditions, monitored for liver toxicity.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients on methotrexate (representative hepatotoxin; massive cross-indication with RA, psoriasis).
